form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th on March 26 over 295m at this track behind Opawa April beaten 6 lengths (17.48) in a Class 5. Has run hot time here with a 16.84 PB at the distance. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.05) in a Class 5, finishing a 4 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from nine starts. Racing well enough to play a big role.

form.formComment: Could manage only fourth last time but impressed the start prior when he recorded a solid 17.18 over 295m finishing third at this track. Looks tested.
